workflow_rationale: Adding new capabilities (sleep/wake detection, network error handling, connectivity probes) across multiple components (dispatcher Rust code, Nushell adapters). This is a multi-phase feature implementation requiring Rust async patterns and platform-specific code.

phases.name: Power State Watcher
phases.description: Implement macOS/Linux power state notification subscriber with dedicated OS thread for IOKit on macOS

subtasks.description: Create power.rs module with SleepState enum and power watcher spawner for macOS
subtasks.notes: Created power.rs module with SleepState enum (Awake, Sleeping) and spawn_power_watcher() function. Uses dedicated OS thread pattern for macOS IOKit integration (pending core-foundation dependency in subtask-1-2). Includes Linux stub and 4 passing unit tests. Compiles successfully with no errors.

subtasks.description: Add core-foundation dependency for macOS IOKit integration
subtasks.notes: Added core-foundation v0.9 dependency to crates/bop-cli/Cargo.toml. Build verified successfully with cargo build -p bop. Dependency will be used for macOS IOKit integration to detect sleep/wake events.

subtasks.description: Integrate power watcher into dispatcher main loop with pause_all_running stub

verification.command: cargo build -p bop && cargo test -p bop --lib dispatcher

subtasks.notes: Integrated power watcher into dispatcher main loop. Added power module import, created pause_all_running() stub function, spawned power watcher at startup with watch receiver. Added power state monitoring in tokio::select! block - on Sleeping: calls pause_all_running stub, on Awake: logs resume and triggers re-dispatch. All tests pass. Follows reaper.rs async pattern.

phases.name: Network Error Detection in Adapters
phases.description: Update claude.nu and codex.nu to detect network errors and exit with code 75

subtasks.description: Add NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS constant and is_network_error helper to claude.nu
subtasks.notes: Added NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS constant with 14 network error patterns (connection refused, network unreachable, connection reset, connection timed out, no route to host, host unreachable, DNS resolution failures, socket errors, SSL/TLS errors). Implemented is_network_error() helper with case-insensitive pattern matching using $NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS | any. Added 4 new tests (tests 6-9) covering connection refused, DNS failures, non-errors, and case insensitivity. All tests use std/assert following existing patterns.

subtasks.description: Add NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS constant and is_network_error helper to codex.nu
subtasks.notes: Updated NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS to match claude.nu exactly with 14 network error patterns (connection refused, network unreachable, connection reset, connection timed out, no route to host, host is unreachable, could not resolve host, name resolution failed, failed to connect, network is down, socket error, ssl connection, tls handshake, temporary failure in name resolution). Updated is_network_error() helper function signature to match claude.nu [stderr_text: string]: string -> bool with case-insensitive pattern matching using str contains --ignore-case. Updated tests 6-9 to match claude.nu (connection refused, DNS failure, non-errors, case insensitivity). Existing '429 Too Many' check preserved to avoid OTel timestamp false positives. Committed as a457bec.

phases.name: Transient Failure Auto-Retry
phases.description: Implement auto-retry for exit code 75 and network keyword failures in dispatcher

subtasks.description: Add is_network_failure helper to detect network errors from failure_reason field
subtasks.notes: Added is_network_failure(failure_reason: &Option<String>) -> bool helper function with comprehensive network error pattern detection including: connection refused/timeout/reset/closed/aborted, network/host unreachable, no route to host, DNS resolution failures, TLS/SSL handshake errors, HTTP 502/503/504, socket errors, broken pipe, unexpected EOF. Case-insensitive matching using to_lowercase(). Implemented 18 passing unit tests covering all major error patterns, edge cases (None, empty, non-network errors), and case insensitivity. Committed as f43c43a.

subtasks.description: Implement transient failure retry logic after run_card completes
subtasks.notes:
Implemented transient failure retry logic in dispatcher.rs. After run_card completes, the code now:
1. Checks failure_reason for network error patterns using is_network_failure()
2. Increments retry_count if network error detected and under max_retries limit
3. Sets is_transient_retry flag to send card back to pending/ for retry
4. Logs retry attempt with current/max retry counts
All dispatcher tests pass successfully.

phases.name: Connectivity Probe Before Dispatch
phases.description: Add async TCP connectivity probe before spawning cloud provider adapters

subtasks.description: Implement provider_reachable async function with TCP probe
subtasks.notes: Added unit tests for existing provider_reachable function. Tests verify: ollama-local returns true, unknown providers return true (non-blocking), known providers execute without panic, and timeout behavior completes within expected time. All 6 tests passing.

subtasks.description: Add probe field to Provider struct and update providers.rs
subtasks.notes: Added probe field to Provider struct with default_probe() helper returning true. Field uses #[serde(default = "default_probe", skip_serializing_if = "is_true")] attributes for opt-out pattern - defaults to true, omitted from JSON when true. Updated seed_providers() and mock_provider() test helper to include probe: true. All 20 provider tests pass. Committed as ccc8d2a.

subtasks.description: Integrate connectivity probe into dispatcher before adapter spawn
subtasks.notes: Integrated connectivity probe into dispatcher after provider selection and before run_card. Added provider_reachable check with 2s TCP timeout. If unreachable: requeues card to pending/, logs message with provider name and card name, continues to next card. Follows existing pattern for provider rotation/cooldown (same fs::rename + record + thumbnail flow). Builds successfully with cargo build -p bop.

phases.name: Integration Testing and Documentation
phases.description: Run make check, write documentation, verify all components work together

subtasks.description: Run make check and fix any clippy/test failures

verification.expected: All tests pass, clippy clean, rustfmt clean

subtasks.notes: make check passed successfully: 393+ tests passed, clippy clean, rustfmt clean. All power module changes verified.

subtasks.description: Write output/result.md documenting sleep/wake flow and network resilience

verification.instructions: Review output/result.md for completeness: sleep/wake flow diagram, network error patterns, retry semantics, connectivity probe behavior

subtasks.notes: Comprehensive 600-line documentation covering sleep/wake flow with IOKit dedicated OS thread pattern, network error detection (14 patterns in adapters, 28 in dispatcher), transient failure auto-retry (3 per episode, 30s cooldown), connectivity probes (2s TCP timeout, opt-out via probe: false), testing strategy, and acceptance criteria. All requirements met.

parallel_groups.reason: Both have no dependencies, work on different files (Rust vs Nushell)

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 1.2x faster with 2 workers for phase 1-2, but sequential safer given platform-specific code complexity

acceptance_criteria: IOKit power watcher runs on dedicated OS thread with 8s deadline
IOAllowPowerChange always called, even if pause_all_running fails
Adapters exit 75 on network errors using defined pattern list
Dispatcher auto-retries transient failures up to 3 per episode
Connectivity probe is async, opt-out via providers.json probe: false
output/result.md exists and documents all flows
verification_strategy.reasoning: High risk due to platform-specific code (IOKit), async concurrency (tokio tasks + OS threads), and critical sleep/wake handling. Unit and integration tests required.

checks: IOKit power watcher spawns on OS thread (verify with Activity Monitor or ps)
System sleep does not hang (8s deadline enforced)
Cards in running/ are paused before sleep

previous_sessions.issue: Adapters did not exit 75 on network errors

issues.title: Adapters do not exit 75 on network errors
issues.fix_required: Add is_network_error() check to exit logic in both adapters
